title: Complex Roots
summary: This page finishes the discussion of repeated characteristic roots, showing that an r-fold repeated root λ produces modes e^{λt}, te^{λt}, ..., t^{r−1}e^{λt} and a polynomial-times-exponential solution. It then introduces complex conjugate roots for real systems and derives the equivalent real-form zero-input response ce^{αt} cos(βt + θ) from the complex exponential expression.
